exceptions.subject: Release Process runbook section
exceptions.reason: Known scanner limitation per spec § 3.S2 v1 limitations: 'Sections with novel formats may slip through.' The Release Process is a process runbook (step-by-step instructions for every push, with small classification sub-tables for bump-types and per-release file changes) — not architecture content. The Codex finding #4 fix silenced the navigation-table false-positives for `Where to Look` and the two sub-tables, but the parent runbook still scores 8 because its body aggregates the sub-tables plus two incidental mentions of the word 'field' in the CHANGELOG-format example. v6.1+ may add a runbook-shape pattern (numbered sub-headings) to S2; until then, this is a documented genuine exception, not bug-masking.
